reason: Failed publishing gate: every load-bearing claim (production timeline, Broadcom/TSMC partnership, 7GW->14GW capacity target) traces to a single origin -- a Reuters exclusive citing an internal Meta memo -- which all press coverage (TechCrunch, CNBC, Yahoo Finance/Reuters wire, US News) re-reports without independent confirmation. Meta declined to comment when asked, so no Tier-0 confirmation exists either. Per policy/verification.md, business claims need >=2 independent Tier<=2 sources or a filing/document; this does not clear that bar.
watch: A Meta statement or filing confirming/denying the chip production timeline
A second, independently-sourced report (not citing the same Reuters memo) with corroborating or conflicting details
September 2026 itself, when production would start if the report is accurate -- can be checked directly
